description:
`bw list` today accepts `--limit` (default 10) but no `--offset`, no `--fields`/`--select`. Large ticket stores either get truncated silently or dumped in full. MCP wrappers hitting a ~1000-ticket store see 994KB responses that overflow context windows.

**Fix:**
- Add `--offset N`.
- Add `--fields id,title,status,type,priority,parent` (comma-separated; default stays current behavior).
- Provide a terse default format (`--format short`) that emits one line per ticket: `id  status  type  priority  title`.

**Acceptance:**
- `bw list --fields id,title --limit 5 --offset 10` returns exactly 5 rows, tickets 11–15, id+title only.
- JSON mode with `--fields` returns projected objects (not full Issue structs).
- Default behavior unchanged.
title: bw list projection + paging (--fields, --offset)
